role: Poet; scholar; high school teacher; assassinated with his son 1998
bio: Hamid Hajizadeh was a poet, scholar, and high school teacher in Kerman. On the night of 22 September 1998, [Ministry of Intelligence](/orgs/ministry-of-intelligence) agents entered his home and stabbed him 38 times in his bed. His nine-year-old son Karoon (Karun) was sleeping in his father's arms and was also stabbed to death. The murder of Hajizadeh and his child — one of the most horrifying acts of the [chain murders](/events/chain-murders-iran-1998) — occurred two months before the more widely publicised assassinations of the Forouhars in November 1998.
editorial_notes: Poet and teacher in Kerman. Stabbed 38 times on 22 September 1998. His 9-year-old son Karoon was killed alongside him.
